mapper.sql: pest.header_id as pes_id, pest.employee_id as pe_id, pest.name, pest.relationship, pest.company, pest.post, pest.tele, pest.in_factory_flag, pest.instructions_flag, pest.check_flag, pest.id, pest.enabled_flag, pest.create_by, pest.update_time, pest.create_time, pest.update_by

${tAlias}.header_id as ${tAlias}_pes_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.in_factory_flag as ${tAlias}_in_factory_flag, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_socialrelations_temp (header_id, employee_id, name, relationship, company, post, tele, in_factory_flag, instructions_flag, check_flag, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by) values (#{employeeSocialrelations.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_socialrelations_temp set header_id = #{employeeSocialrelations.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, in_factory_flag = #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
